title: torreyochloa viridis
intro: Torreyochloa viridis, also known as green needle grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and prevent infections. The health benefits of Torreyochloa viridis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
